claim: Negative example: for n=16777216 medium-density unordered-equivalent select/filter/compact on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, the custom global-atomic compaction candidate measured 0.822980x the hipCUB DeviceSelect::Flagged baseline speed using HIP-event timing only, so it did not improve performance.
expected_profiler_signals: global atomic contention in the custom candidate
density-sensitive performance crossover for future sweeps
curation_note: negative example, timing-only: both paths passed unordered-equivalent CPU-reference checks, but the custom global-atomic candidate is slower than hipCUB DeviceSelect for this medium-density shape. No rocprofiler/rocprof counters were collected.
